mapper.sql: id, group_id, title, type, create_time, update_time, status, last_message_id, token, bot_id, settings
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM telegram_group WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND token = #{token}
SELECT * FROM telegram_group WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND token = #{token}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM telegram_group WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND token = #{token}
mapper.insert:
insert into telegram_group
id,
group_id,
title,
type,
create_time,
update_time,
status,
token,
bot_id,
settings,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{botId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{settings,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update telegram_group
group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
last_message_id = #{lastMessageId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
token = #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bot_id = #{botId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
settings = #{settings,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update telegram_group set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, token = #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bot_id = #{botId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, settings = #{settings,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
